top_signals.title: Fresh Strikes Threaten US Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar and ABC News' Shannon Kingston say renewed attacks in and around the Strait of Hormuz have undermined fragile diplomatic efforts, with Gulf allies pressing to revive negotiations as shipping and regional security remain under threat. They say technical talks continue to face resistance from hardline factions in Iran, while Sen. Lindsey Graham's death leaves a significant void for US foreign policy and bipartisan support for Ukraine. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US, Iran Trade Wave of Strikes While Disputing Status of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The US struck Iran for a third time in a week, prompting retaliatory attacks on at least five Arab nations as Washington and Tehran issued conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz remains open to shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
